channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 6 Of A Family Among 10 Shot Dead In Mexico, Domestic Dispute Suspected

media:content.media:description: Authorities did not say whether there were any suspects in killings (Representational)

item.description: Six men, three women and a minor died in a shooting inside a home in the municipality of Tehuitzingo, located approximately 200 kilometers south of Mexico City
item.content:encoded: Six men, three women and a minor died in a shooting inside a home in the municipality of Tehuitzingo, located approximately 200 kilometers south of Mexico City

item.title: 'Lack Of Knowledge': India Rejects Dutch PM's Remarks On Press Freedom, Minority Rights

media:content.media:description: The exchange took place when a Dutch journalist questioned the absence of a joint press interaction

item.description: The diplomat, citing the recently held assembly elections in several regions in the country, said India is a "vibrant democracy" where "peaceful transition of power" is a key feature.
item.content:encoded: The diplomat, citing the recently held assembly elections in several regions in the country, said India is a "vibrant democracy" where "peaceful transition of power" is a key feature.

item.title: 4 Key Takeaways From Elon Musk's Lawsuit Against OpenAI Co-Founders

media:content.media:description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman (File)

item.description: At the opening of the trial on April 28, Musk portrayed himself as a selfless benefactor and Good Samaritan concerned with protecting humanity from an AI that, if left in the wrong hands, could "kill us all."
item.content:encoded: At the opening of the trial on April 28, Musk portrayed himself as a selfless benefactor and Good Samaritan concerned with protecting humanity from an AI that, if left in the wrong hands, could "kill us all."

item.title: Qantas Flight To Texas Diverted After Passenger Allegedly 'Bites' Crew Member Mid-Air

media:content.media:description: The video does not show the alleged biting.

item.description: He became even more aggressive when the staff told him that they might restrain him. Several passengers also got up to help the crew control him.
item.content:encoded: He became even more aggressive when the staff told him that they might restrain him. Several passengers also got up to help the crew control him.

item.title: Video: Moment 2 Jets Collided Mid-Air At US Air Show

media:content.media:description: The aircraft were performing an aerial demonstration when the collision occurred

item.description: Two US Navy EA18-G Growlers Collide During Air Show In Idaho
item.content:encoded: Two US Navy EA18-G Growlers Collide During Air Show In Idaho

item.title: US Iran War News Highlights: Trump's "Clock Ticking" Threat To Iran, Tehran Readies Hormuz Traffic "Mechanism"

media:content.media:description: US Iran War News Highlights

item.description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

item.title: Trump Likely To Hold Key Meeting Over Military Action On Iran: Report

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump may discuss military options against Iran.

item.description: The meeting will come after Donald Trump issued a stark warning to Iran on Sunday, saying that the clock in ticking for Tehran.
item.content:encoded: The meeting will come after Donald Trump issued a stark warning to Iran on Sunday, saying that the clock in ticking for Tehran.

item.title: India, Sweden Upgrade Bilateral Ties To 'Strategic Partnership'

media:content.media:description: PM Modi had earlier visited Sweden in 2018

item.description: India and Sweden on Sunday agreed to elevate the bilateral relationship to a Strategic Partnership, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi held talks with his Swedish counterpart Ulf Kristersson, focusing on trade, technology, defence, and other key sectors
item.content:encoded: India and Sweden on Sunday agreed to elevate the bilateral relationship to a Strategic Partnership, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi held talks with his Swedish counterpart Ulf Kristersson, focusing on trade, technology, defence, and other key sectors

item.title: "Won't Be Anything Left Of Them": Trump's "Clock Ticking" Warning To Iran

media:content.media:description: The US president warned that there won't be anything left of Iran unless it agrees to a deal.

item.description: "Clock Is Ticking, Better Get Moving": Trump's Latest Warning To Iran
item.content:encoded: "Clock Is Ticking, Better Get Moving": Trump's Latest Warning To Iran

item.title: Paris Probes Child Abuse By Staff At 84 Kindergartens, 20 Primary Schools

media:content.media:description: An estimated 160,000 children suffer rape or sexual assault each year in France.

item.description: Parents in the city have in recent months accused supervisors in charge of children outside the classroom -- such as during recess or before pick-up -- of mistreating, or physically or sexually abusing pupils in their care.
item.content:encoded: Parents in the city have in recent months accused supervisors in charge of children outside the classroom -- such as during recess or before pick-up -- of mistreating, or physically or sexually abusing pupils in their care.

item.title: PM Modi Receives Sweden's Top Honour, Royal Order Of Polar Star

media:content.media:description: This is Prime Minister Modi's 31st international honour.

item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi was on Sunday conferred with Sweden's Royal Order of Polar Star, the highest honour awarded to a Head of Government by the Scandinavian nation.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1100542/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Prime Minister Narendra Modi was on Sunday conferred with Sweden's Royal Order of Polar Star, the highest honour awarded to a Head of Government by the Scandinavian nation.

item.title: Iran Has Found Another Achilles' Heel Lurking Beneath Strait Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Repair and maintenance rights would also be handed exclusively to Iranian companies.

item.description: Tehran is seeking to levy fees on firms including Google, Microsoft, Meta and Amazon for use of the submarine cables that pass beneath the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Tehran is seeking to levy fees on firms including Google, Microsoft, Meta and Amazon for use of the submarine cables that pass beneath the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Indian Among 3 Killed In Ukrainian Drone Attack On Moscow

media:content.media:description: A wave of almost 600 Ukrainian drones attacked Russia overnight.

item.description: Embassy officials have visited the site of the attack and met the injured workers in the hospital, the statement added.
item.content:encoded: Embassy officials have visited the site of the attack and met the injured workers in the hospital, the statement added.

item.title: 10 New Suspected Victims Come Forward In France's Epstein Probe

media:content.media:description: Investigators were also scouring through the so-called Epstein files.

item.description: France opened a human trafficking investigation after the US Justice Department in January released the latest cache of files from the investigation into the disgraced financier.
item.content:encoded: France opened a human trafficking investigation after the US Justice Department in January released the latest cache of files from the investigation into the disgraced financier.

item.title: UAE Nuclear Power Plant Hit By Drone, Triggers Massive Fire

media:content.media:description: Emirati officials did not attribute blame for the attack on the nuclear power plant.

item.description: The drone hit an electrical generator outside the inner perimeter of the Barakah Nuclear Power Plant, the Abu Dhabi Media Office said.
item.content:encoded: The drone hit an electrical generator outside the inner perimeter of the Barakah Nuclear Power Plant, the Abu Dhabi Media Office said.

item.title: No Actual Concessions In US Response To Iran's Proposal To End War: Report

media:content.media:description: In its proposal, Iran had called for an end of the war on all fronts.

item.description: The report added that the US had conditioned the cessation of hostilities on all fronts on the start of negotiations.
item.content:encoded: The report added that the US had conditioned the cessation of hostilities on all fronts on the start of negotiations.

item.title: Robot Monks Take Part In Lantern Parade Ahead Of Buddha's Birthday In South Korea

media:content.media:description: The robots have been given the role of honorary monks for this year's celebrations.

item.description: During the parade, visitors gathered along the streets for nearly 40 minutes as the robot monks moved through the city under colourful lanterns.
item.content:encoded: During the parade, visitors gathered along the streets for nearly 40 minutes as the robot monks moved through the city under colourful lanterns.

item.title: Trump's Advisers Warn China Could Attack Taiwan Within 5 Years: Report

media:content.media:description: During the summit, China formally described Taiwan as "the most important issue in China-US relations".

item.description: Despite the warm atmosphere that surrounded the Trump-Xi summit, those close to the US president are said to be deeply uneasy about Beijing's intentions.
item.content:encoded: Despite the warm atmosphere that surrounded the Trump-Xi summit, those close to the US president are said to be deeply uneasy about Beijing's intentions.

item.title: "Shoot Him In Neck Like Charlie Kirk": Chants At UK's Pro-Palestine Rally

media:content.media:description: Several protestors described themselves as both anti-genocide and anti-fascist.

item.description: Protestors at the pro-Palestinian march carried signs that read "smash the far right" and "Free Palestinian Hostages".
item.content:encoded: Protestors at the pro-Palestinian march carried signs that read "smash the far right" and "Free Palestinian Hostages".

item.title: Iran-Backed Terrorist Plotted Trump Assassination Through New Proxy Group

media:content.media:description: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi was identified as a senior official in terror group Kata'ib Hizballah

item.description: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi worked with a new Iranian-backed terrorist group that allegedly emerged "overnight" after the United States and Israel attacked Iran.
item.content:encoded: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi worked with a new Iranian-backed terrorist group that allegedly emerged "overnight" after the United States and Israel attacked Iran.
